```
class UserFactory
```

```
class User
  function posts() → HasMany
class Post
  function user() → BelongsTo
  function taggable() → MorphTo
class ChildPost
class Comment
class CommonBuilder
  function foo() → static
```

```
class Posts
```

### types/Database/Eloquent/Relations.php
```
class User
  function address() → HasOne
  function posts() → HasMany
  function latestPost() → HasOne
  function roles() → BelongsToMany
  function mechanic() → HasOne
  function mechanics() → HasMany
  function car() → HasOneThrough
  function cars() → HasManyThrough
class Post
  function user() → BelongsTo
  function image() → MorphOne
  function comments() → MorphMany
  function latestComment() → MorphOne
  function tags() → MorphToMany
class Comment
  function commentable() → MorphTo
class Tag
  function posts() → MorphToMany
class Mechanic
  function car() → HasOne
  function parts() → HasMany
class ChildUser
class Address
class Role
```
